channel.title: NAN Seery, V Li, AL Nguyen, I Roos, KA Buzzard, R Atvars, N Taylor, K Tunnell, J Carey, C Dwyer, HFL Taylor, J Baker, MP Marriott, TJ Kilpatrick, T Kalincik, M Monif | PlatCOVID

item.title: Evaluating the perspective of patients with MS and related conditions on their DMT in relation to the COVID-19 pandemic in one MS centre in Australia.
